input.background: The probability density function of the lifetime of an electric motor is given by $$f(t)=0.25 t e^{-0.5 t} \quad t>0$$ where $t$ is in years.
input.question: If no more than $3 \%$ of the motors are to require warranty services, what is the maximum number of days for which the motor can be warranted?

output.method: 达到指定概率所需的最小样本量
output.answer: The maximum number of days for which the motor can be warranted is 195.3 days.
